name: Bloodthirster
effect: Once per combat at 40% Health, gain a 25% max Health Shield that lasts up to 5 seconds.

name: Guardian Angel
stats:
+10% Attack Damage
+15 Attack Speed
+10% Ability Power
effect: At 60% Health, briefly become untargetable, shed negative effects, and heal 30% missing health.

name: Infinity Edge
effect:
Gain Precision.

Precision: Ability damage can critically strike. Additional Precision grants 10% Critical Strike Damage.

name: Last Whisper
effect:
Damage from attacks and Abilities 30% Sunder the target for 3 seconds. This effect does not stack.

Sunder: Reduce Armor

effect: Gain 15% additional Damage Amp against Tanks.

effect: Gain 7% stacking Attack Speed every second.

name: Rabadon's Deathcap
effect: This humble hat can help you make, or unmake, the world itself.

effect:
Gain Precision.

Precision: Ability damage can critically strike. Additional Precision grants 10% Critical Strike Damage.

effect: Gain 10% additional Attack Damage and Ability Power from all sources.

stats:

name: Morellonomicon
effect:
Attacks and Abilities deal 1% Burn and 33% Wound to enemies for 10 seconds.

Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second

Wound: Reduces healing received

name: Sunfire Cape
effect:
Gain 8% max Health.

Every 2 seconds, deal 1% Burn and 33% Wound to an enemy within 2 hexes for 10 seconds.

Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second

Wound: Reduces healing received

name: Bramble Vest
effect:
Gain 6% max health.

Take 5% reduced damage from attacks. When struck by any attack, deal 100 magic damage to all adjacent enemies.

Cooldown: 2 seconds

name: Titan's Resolve
effect:
Gain 2% Attack Damage and 2% Ability Power when attacking or taking damage, stacking up to 25 times.

At full stacks, gain 10% Damage Amp and gain immunity to crowd control.

name: Ionic Spark
effect:
30% Shred enemies within 2 hexes. When enemies cast an Ability, deal magic damage equal to 150% of the Mana spent

Shred: Reduce Magic Resist

name: Rapid Firecannon
effect: Gain +1 Attack Range, increased by 1 whenever the holder kills an enemy.

name: Redemption
effect:
Every 5 seconds, heal allies within 2 hexes for 12% of their missing Health.
